assets.name: Bitcoin
assets.note: Strong institutional adoption. Regulatory clarity. Wyckoff spring zone
assets.note_detailed:
BTC holds Leader status in the framework, representing highest-conviction assets with established track records. Leaders receive priority for accumulation when conditions align.
As a store-of-value asset, the scoring heavily weights institutional adoption (40%) and supply dynamics (25%), with less emphasis on protocol revenue.

DIMENSION BREAKDOWN:
• Institutional (92/100, 40% weight): Excellent institutional presence. ETF flows, corporate treasuries, major custody support
• Regulatory (88/100, 15% weight): Clear regulatory standing. ETF approved, commodity classification in most jurisdictions
• Supply/On-Chain (85/100, 25% weight): Healthy on-chain metrics with favorable supply distribution and accumulation patterns.
• Revenue/Fees (50/100, 5% weight): Moderate revenue, typical for growth-phase protocols.
• Wyckoff (50/100, 15% weight): Currently in Phase B→C. Technical structure is being monitored for clearer phase identification.

• Daily RSI at 65.1 sits in neutral range.
• Weekly RSI at 42.3 remains in healthy range.

CURRENT ACTION:
ACCUMULATE status indicates this Leader-tier asset meets tranche-building criteria: composite above threshold, favorable Wyckoff phase, and RSI not overbought. Systematic position building is appropriate.

This places the asset in the top tier of framework scoring, indicating strong alignment across weighted dimensions.
